sections.paragraph:
Original: מקלות

Transliteration: miqlôth

Phonetic: mik-lohth'

BDB Definition:

Mikloth = "staves"
  1. one of the sons of Jehiel, the father or prince of Gibeon by his
  2. leader of the 2nd division of David's army

Origin: plural of (feminine) H4731

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
